description.content: Lists all available REST API operations for Microsoft.Network.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Azure Load Balancer distributes incoming network traffic across backend resources. The REST API manages load balancers, frontend IP configurations, backend pools, load balancing rules, and probes.
